---
title: "Teaching"
pagetitle: "Teaching — Quan (Kyle) Zhang"
---

## Teaching

::: {.pub-list}
::: {.pub}
**Instructor** — Introduction to Statistics. Department of Economics, University of Hawaiʻi at Mānoa. Summer 2025.
:::

::: {.pub}
**Teaching Assistant** — Principles of Microeconomics & Macroeconomics. University of Hawaiʻi at Mānoa. 2023–2024.
:::
:::

## Mentoring

I am happy to talk with students interested in health economics, causal inference,
and the economics of aging. Feel free to [get in touch](mailto:quanz@hawaii.edu).
